label: Bathroom Remodeling
title: Fort Myers Bathroom Update
description: A focused bathroom remodel completed with attention to layout, finish quality, and the way the space needs to function in daily use.
scope: Shower update, vanity installation, trim, paint, and finish details.
result: A cleaner, sharper, more functional bathroom that feels right in daily use.

label: Interior Renovation
title: Cape Coral Interior Refresh
description: Interior improvements carried out with the goal of making the home feel more finished, more cohesive, and more enjoyable to live in.
scope: Drywall repair, trim work, paint coordination, flooring adjustments, and finish carpentry.
result: A tighter, more polished interior with cleaner transitions and better overall feel.

label: Repair & Finish Work
title: Detail Repair and Finish Restoration
description: Smaller detail-sensitive work completed with the same standards as larger remodels, especially where the repair needs to blend cleanly into the existing home.
scope: Repair work, finish correction, texture blending, and detail cleanup.
result: Work that feels integrated, intentional, and properly finished rather than patched over.
